app.name: Wallery
app.subtitle: 幕间 · 幕后的每一帧

sources.title: Wallpaper Sources
sources.bing_desc: Microsoft Bing daily image, auto-matched to your region
sources.wallhaven_desc: High quality community wallpapers, no API key needed
sources.nasa_desc: Astronomy Picture of the Day — explore the universe
sources.pexels_desc: Free high-resolution photography, needs API key
sources.unsplash_desc: Photographer community selections, needs API key

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.autostart_desc: Launch on startup, minimized to tray
schedule.mac_hint: macOS users: lock screen is not supported. Add to Login Items in System Settings → General → Login Items for auto-start.

about.story_p1: There really isn't a good free wallpaper app out there.
about.story_p2: I tried many — subscription fees, ugly interfaces, abandoned projects. The ones labeled 'free' hid paywalls everywhere.
about.story_p3: So I built my own. Completely free, completely open source, forever.
about.story_p4: Wallery — every beautiful frame behind the curtain should belong to everyone.
about.sponsor_sub:
If Wallery made your desktop a little more beautiful,
consider buying me a coffee? Every bit of support fuels development.
